findings.title: Derived requirement missing safety feedback record
findings.detail: SWR-DRV-LAT-003 (roll command zeroing during output-bus initialization) has no recorded feedback to the system safety process, required for derived requirements at Level B.

findings.title: Broken LLR-to-model trace link
findings.detail: SWR-LLR-LAT-052 no longer resolves to a model element after the ModeLogic restructure; downstream trace is empty and the review of the decomposition is stale.

history.note: Automated trace audit reported unresolved downstream reference.

findings.title: Stale data-dictionary review
findings.detail: guidance_types.sldd Rev 8 introduced the bank-limit bus change, but the recorded review (REV-2026-122) covers Rev 7. Re-review is required before credit is taken.
findings.disposition: Re-review scheduled with the model review board; interim use restricted to analysis.

history.note: Re-review planned for the July model review board.

findings.title: Missing code-to-design trace
findings.detail: mode_logic.c::select_capture_mode carries no model origin link. Either restore the generated-code trace annotation or document it as hand-modified code with its own LLR trace.

history.note: Model-to-code sweep found an unlinked function.

findings.title: Robustness test failure in stale-input recovery
findings.detail: TC-LAT-ROBUST-007 iteration 2 failed: bank command exceeded the scheduled limit for one frame during stale-input recovery. Tracked with PR-2026-005.
findings.disposition: Confirmed software behavior deviation; fix required before closure of baseline 2.4.0 verification.
findings.correctiveAction: Clamp recovery path added under CR-2026-010; re-run of robustness suite scheduled.

findings.title: Stale result hash on regression subset archive
findings.detail: RegressionResults_2_4_0 stored hash no longer matches the recomputed archive hash; the archive was re-packed without a controlled re-run. Tracked with PR-2026-003.

findings.title: Decision coverage gap in limit_bank_command
findings.detail: Structural coverage for lateral_guidance.c::limit_bank_command reports 92.4% decision coverage; the high-speed limit branch is not exercised by the current boundary suite.
findings.disposition: Additional boundary iteration planned; gap traced to the 2.4.0 envelope extension.

history.note: New iteration TC-LAT-BOUNDARY-008/6 defined for the 27° segment.

findings.title: Missing review independence on LLR review
findings.detail: REV-2026-112 for SWR-LLR-LAT-052 was performed by the requirement author. Level B requires independent review of LLRs; the review must be repeated.

findings.title: Obsolete SCI reference in PSAC
findings.detail: PLN-PSAC Rev E cites Software Configuration Index Rev C; the current index is Rev E. The PSAC reference set must be updated before the certification submission.
findings.disposition: Editorial update batched into the next PSAC revision cycle.

history.note: Found during certification readiness audit AUD-2026-06.

findings.title: Change record without reverification
findings.detail: CR-2026-009 (bank limit interpolation slope) is implemented in baseline 2.4.0, but the affected boundary tests have not been re-executed; verification credit is not yet re-established.
findings.disposition: Change impact confirmed; targeted re-run required rather than full regression.
findings.correctiveAction: Boundary suite re-run queued on verification host aeronav-vv-02.

findings.title: Coding-standard deviation approved by DER
findings.detail: DEV-2026-004 (MISRA Rule 17.8 in generated interpolation code) is approved by the DER. Recorded as a finding so the deviation remains visible in audit scope.
findings.disposition: Deviation approved by DER H. Whitfield on 2026-06-30; no corrective action required.

history.note: Deviation record promoted to audit visibility.
Deviation approved; retained for audit trail.

findings.title: Test procedure metadata mismatch (ready for closure)
findings.detail: TC-LAT-REQ-012 procedure header cited requirement revision Rev 3 while executing against Rev 4. Header corrected and procedure re-baselined; awaiting reverification evidence and independent closure.
findings.disposition: Metadata defect confirmed; no impact on executed test logic.
findings.correctiveAction: Procedure header corrected in Rev 4 and re-baselined into 2.4.0.
findings.reverificationPlan: Attach re-executed TC-LAT-REQ-012 result delta and an independent QA confirmation review.

history.note: Header corrected; procedure Rev 4 checked in.
